svg.title: LeNet-5 End-to-End Latency Breakdown
svg.desc: Donut chart showing latency breakdown for LeNet-5 inference on 200 MNIST images at 100 MHz. MVM ping-pong wall time dominates at 86.9% (25.36 ms). Total: 29.18 ms/image at 34.3 fps.
svg.text: LeNet-5 End-to-End Latency Breakdown — 200 MNIST Images @ 100 MHz
Hardware compute time dominates; Python overhead < 13%
